items.title: Johnson & Johnson CAR T Therapy Shows 80% Response in Lymphoma Trial
items.description: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) ranks among the top stocks for an early retirement portfolio. On June 13, Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) announced that patients with relapsed or refractory large B-cell lymphoma (LBCL) showed strong response rates to its investigational dual-targeting CAR T-cell treatment. According to results given at the 2025 European Hematology Association Congress, the […]
